reasoning: Given that Marignane (Marseille airport) has a Mediterranean climate, the daily mean temperature in late October (around 16°C) is significantly higher than that in late January (around 7.5°C). The temperature on October 26, 2025, is highly likely to be warmer than on the implied resolution date of January 24, 2026. Assuming standard distributions for daily temperatures with a standard deviation of 3-4°C, the chance of a random January day being warmer than a random October day is quite low, roughly 2% to 5%. Thus, the likelihood of this occurring is low. *0.03*
